output_preview:
package main

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"fmt"
	"log"
	"net/http"
	"os"
	"runtime"
	"sync/atomic"
	"time"
)

var activeGoroutines int64

func main() {
	port := "8080"
	if p := os.Getenv("PORT"); p != "" {
		port = p
	}

	mux := http.NewServeMux()
	mux.HandleFunc("/compute", computeHandler)
	mux.HandleFunc("/health", healthHandler)
	mux.HandleFunc("/stats", statsHandler)

	server := &http.Server{
		Addr:         ":" + port,
		Handler:      mux,
		ReadTimeout:  10 * time.Second,
		WriteTimeout: 30

cmd: sed -i 's/func performComputation(req ComputeRequest) ComputeResult {/func performComputation(ctx context.Context, req ComputeRequest) ComputeResult {/' /app/app/main.go

sed -i '/time.Sleep(time.Duration(req.DelayMs) * time.Millisecond)/a \
\t		select {\
\t		case <-ctx.Done():\
\t			log.Printf("Computation cancelled due to context done: %v", ctx.Err())\
\t			return ComputeResult{Value: -1, Duration: "cancelled", Iters: i}\
\t		default:\
\t		}' /app/app/main.go
